copy.title: Tigers crush Rays seven to two. White Sox shutout Twins. Knicks host Game Two tomorrow.

lead.headline: White Sox just obliterated Minnesota without breaking a sweat
lead.whatHappened: Chicago shut out the Twins 8-0, a complete dismantling from start to finish. Minnesota brought nothing to the plate and left early mentally.
lead.whyBullet1: The White Sox are clicking at exactly the right time heading into summer baseball where momentum matters.
lead.whyBullet2: Minnesota can't afford games like this—they need to compete in a loaded division and blanking at home is the kind of loss that sticks around.
lead.whatToSay: Yeah the White Sox just reminded everyone they're not a team to sleep on right now.

markets.mood: Tech got hammered today—NVDA down 3.6%, MSFT down 3.2%—as the 10-year yield jumped 0.8%, making bonds look attractive again after weeks of being dead money.
markets.whyBullet1: If you're heavy in growth stocks or tech-heavy funds in your 401k, today's move signals that the free money era is actually over and rates staying higher longer will crimp valuations.
markets.whyBullet2: Watch Thursday and Friday for any Fed speakers or economic data that could push yields higher—if the 10-year crosses above 4.5%, that's the real line in the sand for tech multiples.
markets.bringUp: Bitcoin got crushed down 5.6% today, which usually means institutional money is rotating hard into safer stuff—that's the kind of signal that tends to stick around for a few days, not bounce back overnight.

golf.headline: Campbell, Coody, Fox tied at Memorial as elite field battles Muirfield Village
golf.whyCare1: Muirfield Village is Jack Nicklaus's masterpiece — winning here means something different than anywhere else on tour.
golf.whyCare2: This is a FedEx Cup regular season event where the field shapes up before the playoffs actually matter.
golf.watchFor: Whether Campbell can hold the lead through 72 holes — he's got the hot hand but Muirfield Village punishes mistakes.
golf.whatToSay: Campbell's leading at Muirfield Village right now, which is basically the hardest place on earth to steal a golf tournament.

glance.sports: Tigers crushed Tampa 7–2, White Sox blanked Minnesota 8–0 — baseball's having a day.
glance.market: SPY down 0.7%, but the real story is Big Tech getting hammered: NVDA -3.6%, MSFT -3.2%, BTC -5.6%.
glance.bestConvo: Did you see the White Sox shutout? Zero runs. Minnesota brought nothing. That's the kind of performance you can't come back from.
glance.watchNext: Knicks-Spurs NBA Finals Game 2 tomorrow night — series is 1–0, everything changes with one road win.
glance.quickRec: F1 Monaco Grand Prix this weekend if you want to watch cars do impossible things on a street circuit. Brian Campbell leading the Memorial Tournament if golf's more your speed.
